description: Pre-action clearing for AI agents before they access data, spend money, call tools, or trigger external actions.
capabilities_summary: Local fake-agent pre-action clearing, receipts, evidence, replay, readiness, and manual approval artifacts.
contact_policy: No automatic outreach or live agent connection
safety_boundaries: Local files and deterministic rendering only
No public API, endpoint, hosting, network, or live agent access
No real customer data, credentials, contact details, or private data
No payment, billing, settlement, tracking, analytics, or execution
No legal, compliance, audit, quantum-security, or PQC-compliance certification claim
quantum_readiness: Positioning only; not quantum secure or post-quantum compliant.
next_step: Gareth reviews the local pack before any publishing or live-access decision.
